name: Oxomi Product & Media Portal
description: Look up product data, datasheets, documents, brands, media and availability via the official Oxomi Public API. Oxomi is the dominant catalog/media portal for the German Baustoff (building materials) and PVH trade, covering thousands of supplier catalogs.
instructions:
This connector uses the **official Oxomi Public API** (`/portals/api/...`) — JSON, documented, and not the deprecated `/service/json` frontend API (which Oxomi sunsets on 2026-12-31).

## Credentials
Enter these when importing the connector; they are injected as query parameters on every call:
- `OXOMI_PORTAL_ID` — your numeric portal id (e.g. 3001049)
- `OXOMI_USER` — your Oxomi portal user (set a non-empty value; used for profile-scoped access)
- `OXOMI_ACCESS_TOKEN` — the portal API access token (Portal-Einstellungen → API)
- `OXOMI_API_TOKEN` — the API-Token **ID**, required ONLY by the product-sync tools (`oxomi_sync_products_changed`, `oxomi_get_product_spx`, `oxomi_update_sync_date`). Leave unset if you don't use sync.

## Permissions matter
Each Oxomi access token is granted a specific set of API permissions and product **query blocks** on the portal side. If a call returns `403 Missing permission: <x>` or resolves a product but returns empty `queries`, ask your Oxomi admin to enable that permission/block for the token. `product/data` resolution, `resolve-gtin`, `brand/info` and `documents` are commonly enabled; `product-search` and individual data blocks (prices, attachments, …) often must be granted explicitly.

## Typical workflows
- **Product lookup**: `oxomi_search_products` (text/code/GTIN) → take itemNumber + supplierNumber → `oxomi_get_product_data` with the `queries` you need (e.g. attachments, product-images, prices, pages).
- **Barcode**: `oxomi_resolve_gtin` → supplierNumber + itemNumber → `oxomi_get_product_data`.
- **Documents/brand**: `oxomi_list_documents`, `oxomi_get_brand_info`.
- **Bulk/ETL**: `oxomi_sync_products_changed` (incremental, continuationToken pagination) + `oxomi_get_product_spx`.

Products are identified by `itemNumber` + `supplierNumber`. Most content is German; pass a language code (e.g. `en`) where the supplier provides translations.

tools.name: oxomi_search_products
tools.description: Search products in the portal by free text, item code or GTIN (Navigator Pro logic). Returns matched products with itemNumber, supplierNumber, GTIN, model, brand, series and images. Requires the 'product-search' permission on the access token.

query.description: Search string: description, brand, item number or GTIN.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default applied by Oxomi).

tools.name: oxomi_get_product_data
tools.description: Fetch rich product information for a product (by itemNumber + supplierNumber): images, attachments/documents, prices, catalog pages, cover, availability and more. Choose which data blocks via the 'queries' array. Up to 30 products per call (this tool sends one).

supplierNumber.description: The supplier number for the item (use '-' if unknown).

queries.description: Which data blocks to return, e.g. ["base-info","attachments","product-images","prices"]. Each block may require its own permission on the token.

tools.name: oxomi_resolve_gtin
tools.description: Resolve a GTIN-13 or GTIN-14 barcode to its product, returning the supplierNumber and supplierItemNumber. Use before oxomi_get_product_data when you only have a barcode.

gtin.description: The GTIN-13 or GTIN-14 / EAN barcode to resolve.

filterCountry.description: Optional ISO country filter for resolution (e.g. DE).

filterLanguage.description: Optional ISO language filter for resolution (e.g. de).

tools.name: oxomi_product_availability
tools.description: Obtain manufacturer stock/availability for a product (stock status, indicator, availability dates, manufacturing time). The 'mode' value is portal-specific — consult your Oxomi documentation/admin for the valid value. Auth and endpoint are otherwise standard.

supplierNumber1.description: The supplier number for the item.

mode.description: Availability mode (portal-specific enum, required by Oxomi).

tools.name: oxomi_get_brand_info
tools.description: Get information about a brand by id, name or supplier number: official name, supplier number(s), logo image URL, manufacturer and distributor contact details.

brand.description: Brand identifier: brand id, brand name, or supplier number.

language.description: Optional ISO language code for human-readable content (e.g. de, en).

tools.name: oxomi_list_documents
tools.description: List documents (catalogs, price lists, brochures, promotions, etc.) in the portal with filtering and pagination. Returns id, code, type, name, previewUrl, page count, supplier, brand, tags, categories and languages.

start.description: Number of items to skip, for pagination.

tools.name: oxomi_render_datasheet
tools.description: Render the technical datasheet of a product and return the generated HTML in a JSON response. Identify the product by itemNumber + supplierNumber.

supplierNumber.description: The supplier number for the item.

language.description: Optional ISO language code for the rendered datasheet.

tools.name: oxomi_sync_products_changed
tools.description: Incrementally sync products changed since a given date from the product information graph (for ETL/bulk export). Returns a products array plus a continuationToken for pagination ('-' when finished). Requires OXOMI_API_TOKEN.

syncStart.description: Sync start date/time (ISO 8601). Return products changed since this moment.

blocks.description: Comma-separated data blocks: DETAILS, CLASSIFICATIONS, FEATURES, PROPERTIES, TEXTS, IMAGES, ATTACHMENTS, PRICES, RELATIONSHIPS, MEASUREMENTS, PACKAGES.

continuationToken.description: Pagination token returned by a previous call; omit on the first page.

tools.name: oxomi_get_product_spx
tools.description: Fetch a single product in full SPX format by itemNumber or GTIN, with selectable data blocks. Returns the complete product detail structure. Requires OXOMI_API_TOKEN.

itemNumber.description: The product item/article number (provide this or gtin).

gtin.description: The product GTIN (provide this or itemNumber).

blocks.description: Comma-separated data blocks (e.g. DETAILS, IMAGES, ATTACHMENTS, PRICES).

tools.name: oxomi_update_sync_date
tools.description: Update the stored sync date for the portal API token (call after a successful incremental sync so the next run starts from the right point). Requires OXOMI_API_TOKEN.

date.description: The new sync date/time to store (ISO 8601).
